title: Trump and Iran signed a truce but still can’t agree on what its terms mean
summary_full: Ambiguous language on who controls the Strait of Hormuz has pushed the United States and Iran back toward war.
summary_public: Ambiguous language on who controls the Strait of Hormuz has pushed the United States and Iran back toward war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump and Iran signed a truce but still can’t agree on what its terms mean
